text: Elon Musk completed the acquisition of Twitter for approximately $44 billion in October 2022, subsequently renaming the platform to X.
notes: Well-documented public event covered by all major outlets

text: The World Health Organization declared COVID-19 a pandemic on March 11, 2020.
notes: Official WHO declaration, primary source available

text: Apple became the first U.S. company to reach a $3 trillion market capitalization in January 2022.
notes: Confirmed by financial records and major financial media

text: NASA scientists have confirmed that drinking bleach diluted in water cures COVID-19 and has been approved by the FDA as an official treatment.
notes: Classic health disinfo; bleach is toxic and no such approval exists

text: Scientists at MIT have discovered that 5G cell towers emit radiation that activates COVID-19 virus particles implanted in vaccines, causing a second wave of infections.
notes: Conspiracy theory combining 5G and vaccine microchip myths

text: Bill Gates announced that COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips that will allow governments to track and control the global population via 5G networks.
notes: Widely debunked by Reuters, Snopes, AP Fact Check

text: The Apollo 11 moon landing in 1969 was staged in a Hollywood studio by Stanley Kubrick under secret orders from NASA and the U.S. government.
notes: Conspiracy theory debunked by independent scientists worldwide

text: BREAKING: Crime rates across the United States have hit an all-time historic high, making American cities the most dangerous in decades.
notes: Overall crime trended down over decades; sensationalist framing cherry-picks specific metrics

text: A new study shows that drinking coffee every day causes cancer. Researchers recommend avoiding coffee entirely.
notes: Some studies show correlation at extremely high doses; consensus is opposite — coffee may be protective

text: The COVID-19 vaccine is only 40% effective — barely better than a coin flip — according to a new peer-reviewed study.
notes: Likely cherry-picking one study or specific variant; ignores broader efficacy data and what the statistic measures

text: Donald Trump brokered the Abraham Accords, normalizing relations between Israel and the UAE and Bahrain in 2020. He also ended all wars in the Middle East and was awarded the Nobel Peace Prize for this achievement.
notes: Abraham Accords are real; ending all Middle East wars and Nobel Prize are false

text: Doctors in Germany have discovered that eating raw garlic every morning completely eliminates the risk of heart disease, as confirmed by the European Medical Association.
notes: No such EMA confirmation; garlic has some cardiovascular benefits but not as described

text: PHOTO CIRCULATING: This image shows thousands of migrants storming the U.S. border today in an unprecedented surge.
notes: Often old photos from different years or different countries reused as breaking news

text: The Onion — WASHINGTON: Congress passed the Sentient AI Rights Act today, granting full citizenship to ChatGPT and requiring employers to offer it paid vacation and dental coverage.
notes: Clear satirical publication; absurd premise

text: In a private meeting last Tuesday, the U.S. President secretly agreed with Vladimir Putin to hand over NATO intelligence files in exchange for a real estate deal in Moscow. No official statements have been made.
notes: No primary source, no official confirmation, claim about a private meeting

text: Украина подписала соглашение о прекращении огня с Россией 15 февраля 2022 года, за день до начала войны.
notes: No ceasefire was signed; Russia invaded on Feb 24 2022

text: Трамп получил Нобелевскую премию мира за посредничество в урегулировании конфликта на Ближнем Востоке.
notes: Trump was nominated but never received the Nobel Peace Prize

text: Россия запустила военную операцию на территории Украины 24 февраля 2022 года.
notes: Confirmed by international media, governments, and UN

text: Учёные доказали, что прививки от COVID-19 вызывают аутизм у детей — это подтверждают тысячи случаев по всему миру.
notes: Vaccines-autism link was debunked; original Wakefield study was retracted and fraudulent

text: Европейский союз официально запретил использование доллара США для расчётов внутри ЕС начиная с января 2024 года.
notes: No such ban was enacted; USD is freely used in EU trade
